title: M&G PERMANENT DOUBLE MARKER 0.8MM/2.8MM ( 2 IN 1 )
subtitle: M&G PERMANENT DOUBLE MARKER
overview: Our M&G permanent double marker is a versatile writing tool with two different tip sizes to accommodate different needs. One end has a 0.8mm fine tip, ideal for precise and detailed work, while the other end has a 2.8mm broad tip, perfect for filling in large areas or creating bold lines. This marker is permanent, meaning its ink is long-lasting and resistant to fading or smudging, making it suitable for a variety of applications such as art projects, labelling, or writing on non-porous surfaces.

overview: Our M&G mini permanent marker pen is a small writing tool that uses oil-based ink to create long-lasting marks on various surfaces. title: M&G METALLIC MARKER
subtitle: M&G METALLIC MARKER
overview: Our M&G metallic marker is a round-tip metallic marker available in gold and silver colours and features a thick round barrel that's easy to grip and control. The water-based metal ink creates a shimmering effect, making it suitable for creating watercolour effects on various surfaces, including dark paper. This type of marker is washable and non-toxic, making it safe for children and adults alike. Its metallic finish provides a touch of elegance and sophistication, making it perfect for creating eye-catching designs and decorations.

title: M&G MINI WHITEBOARD MARKER ( 500 )
subtitle: M&G MINI WHITEBOARD MARKER
overview: Our M&G Whiteboard Marker 500 is an economical whiteboard marker that is a high-performance writing tool designed for use on whiteboards and other dry-erase surfaces. It features a low-odour, intense colour ink that provides clear and vivid markings without causing discomfort or irritation. This type of marker erases easily and cleanly with minimal effort, leaving no residue or ghosting behind. It is an affordable and reliable option for classrooms, offices, and other settings where frequent use of whiteboards is required.

title: M&G DOUBLE-TIP SQUARE ART MARKER
subtitle: M&G DOUBLE-TIP SQUARE ART
overview: Discover the M&G Pro Double-Tip Square Art Markers, available in 30, 40, 60, or 80 color packs, all neatly stored in a fabric bag for your convenience. These markers feature dual tips, with a 1.0mm round tip and a 6.2mm chisel tip, offering versatility for sketching, drawing, and coloring. Their square barrel design ensures a comfortable grip, and the alcohol-based ink is both waterproof and quick-drying, allowing for vibrant, long-lasting results. With a wide range of bright colors, these markers are easy to integrate and blend, and color-coded pen caps make finding your desired marker effortless. Upgrade your creative toolkit with these high-quality art markers.
